Off Calendar May-22-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents At Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Its Counsel Of Record
Off Calendar May-22-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions For Spoliation Of Evidence
Off Calendar May-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF JAZZMINE JOHNSON'S Motion For Sanctions For Spoliation Of Evidence.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Jazzmine Johnson moves for an order imposing monetary and issue sanctions on defendant Safeway Inc. Johnson suffered a fall in a Safeway in June 2023 that was likely recorded by surveillance cameras. See Word Minutes for Complete Ruling.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must email it to contestdept301tr@sftc.org

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Continued To Jun-23-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2024 Set For Trial On Mar-03-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
